notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly ambiguous-visible events (battle, refining, conflict) that are ordinary visible events, not hidden knowledge. Events like '仇九故意拖慢魔道队伍速度' are described as observable actions, not private knowledge. The '白凝冰自爆...实际是演戏' event could be a hidden motive, but the seed does not provide direct source text confirming it was a pre-planned act vs. a real self-destruct that happened to have an effect; the summary already mixes interpretation. No clear hidden/future-known/player-visibility fact with direct source support can be extracted from this seed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains many events and entities but the source pointers are limited to entity introductions only, lacking direct quotes for actions or motives. Events like '仇九故意拖慢魔道队伍速度' are summarized but not directly quoted in source pointers. Without direct source-backed evidence for observed actions, cannot confidently infer motives.
Most source pointers only identify characters (names/titles), not their actions or dialogue. The events section provides summaries but no direct source pointer links to those events.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
铁家（铁若男、铁家四老、铁白棋）作为家族集体进攻青铜大殿，有明确的集体行动和利益诉求。铁若男是铁家少主，铁家四老是铁家护卫，铁白棋是铁家高手，种子中直接命名了铁家这一家族集体。压力轴为进攻青铜大殿（地理/资源压力），likelyReactions为保守的一步反应。
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
